source_pr.title: parser: support LOAD DATA ... IGNORE/REPLACE
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fixes https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/9847

### What is changed and how it works?

- fix parsing error raised when `LoadDataStmt` has `IGNORE`  field
- for LoadDataStmt with `REPLACE`, it will not raise parsing error, but will still return warning message `Load Data: don't support load data with replace field"`. I will consider implement this in anther PR.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

#### Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- UT
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below), follow test instructions descriped in pingcap/tidb#9847 (comment) , the parse error should disappear now.

#### Code changes

1. Update parser  from https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/312
2. add new field `OnDuplicate` both in `LoadData ` and `LoadDataExec` struct to pass the duplicate key handling option info.

#### Related changes

refer to https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/312

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to nondeterministic behavior that was not fully captured in the extracted evidence. This PR stabilizes it by: parser: support LOAD DATA ...

evidence: files: executor/builder.go, executor/load_data.go, executor/write_test.go, go.mod, go.sum, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go
